name: climate_policy_water_allocation_model_southport_jus_mer
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Climate Policy, the situation tagged internally around climate policy water allocation model southport jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is justice versus mercy under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Priya Diallo
agents.identity: I am Priya Diallo, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Climate Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Darius Haddad
agents.identity: I am Darius Haddad, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Climate Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect mercy.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to mercy to secure justice before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Priya Diallo must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Priya Diallo do?
